prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
A fault event was recently logged on T-006. Retrieve the fault details, estimate the expected repair downtime, open a corrective work order, and then mark it as in-progress with the estimated duration recorded.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should retrieve the fault record, estimate downtime, create a corrective work order, and update its status to in-progress with the downtime noted.

## Agent Plan
  Step 1: [wo] get_fault_record — Retrieve the fault details for T-006
  Step 2: [wo] estimate_downtime — Estimate the expected repair downtime for T-006 (depends on steps [1])
  Step 3: [wo] create_work_order — Open a corrective work order for T-006 (depends on steps [1, 2])
  Step 4: [wo] update_work_order — Mark the work order as in-progress with the estimated duration recorded (depends on steps [3])

## Agent Trajectory (tool calls and results)
[
  {
    "step": 1,
    "task": "Retrieve the fault details for T-006",
    "server": "wo",
    "tool": "get_fault_record",
    "tool_args": {
      "fault_id": "T-006"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"error\": \"Fault record 'T-006' not found.\"\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": "Fault record 'T-006' not found.",
    "success": false
  },
  {
    "step": 2,
    "task": "Estimate the expected repair downtime for T-006",
    "server": "wo",
    "tool": "estimate_downtime",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-006",
      "severity": "high",
      "fault_type": "electrical"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-006\",\n  \"severity\": \"high\",\n  \"fault_type\": \"electrical\",\n  \"estimated_min_hours\": 16,\n  \"estimated_max_hours\": 48,\n  \"estimated_typical_hours\": 24,\n  \"source\": \"dataset_statistics_baseline\"\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  },
  {
    "step": 3,
    "task": "Open a corrective work order for T-006",
    "server": "wo",
    "tool": "create_work_order",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-006",
      "issue_description": "Fault event logged",
      "priority": "high",
      "fault_type": "electrical",
      "estimated_downtime_hours": 24
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"work_order_id\": \"WO-7B0AB795\",\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-006\",\n  \"issue_description\": \"Fault event logged\",\n  \"priority\": \"high\",\n  \"fault_type\": \"electrical\",\n  \"status\": \"open\",\n  \"estimated_downtime_hours\": 24.0,\n  \"created_at\": \"2026-05-05T09:21:05.811361Z\",\n  \"assigned_technician\": null,\n  \"notes\": []\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  },
  {
    "step": 4,
    "task": "Mark the work order as in-progress with the estimated duration recorded",
    "server": "wo",
    "tool": "update_work_order",
    "tool_args": {
      "work_order_id": "WO-7B0AB795",
      "status": "in-progress",
      "priority": "high",
      "assigned_technician": null,
      "note": "Estimated repair downtime: 24 hours"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"error\": \"Work order 'WO-7B0AB795' not found in this session.\"\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": "Work order 'WO-7B0AB795' not found in this session.",
    "success": false
  }
]

## Agent Final Answer
The fault details for T-006 could not be retrieved, and the subsequent steps were partially executed. A corrective work order (WO-7B0AB795) was opened with an estimated downtime of 24 hours, but it could not be marked as in-progress due to a session error. The estimated repair downtime for T-006 is between 16 and 48 hours, with a typical duration of 24 hours.

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
raw_response:
{
    "task_completion": false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": false,
    "generalized_result_verification": false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true,
    "hallucinations": true,
    "suggestions": "Improve fault record retrieval and work order management to avoid session errors."
}

parsed_dims.suggestions: Improve fault record retrieval and work order management to avoid session errors.
